title: European Heritage Days in Menorca
location: Monuments and sites across the island
description: Every October, Menorca joins the European Heritage Days with free guided visits and activities at monuments and archaeological sites, Talayotic Menorca (a World Heritage Site) included. The 2026 European theme is "Heritage at Risk". The island's programme is published in September at agenda.menorca.es; the European framework dates are 9-11 October.
